channel.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Mar 25th, 2021
item.description:
Visualization

Interactive plots

  • pyechartsstars10.9k - Migrated from Echartsstars46.3k, a charting and visualization library, to Python's interactive visual drawing library.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Jan 1st, 2021
item.description:
Model Explanation

  • Shapleystars87 - A data-driven framework to quantify the value of classifiers in a machine learning ensemble.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Oct 13th, 2020
item.description:
Deep Learning

Others

  • Tangentstars2.2k - Source-to-Source Debuggable Derivatives in Pure Python.
  • autogradstars5.2k - Efficiently computes derivatives of numpy code.
  • Myiastars379 - Deep Learning framework (pre-alpha).
  • nnablastars2.4k - Neural Network Libraries by Sony.
  • Caffestars31.6k - A fast open framework for deep learning.
  • hipCaffestars123 - The HIP port of Caffe.

    • Deep Learning

    TensorFlow

  • Keras - A high-level neural networks API running on top of TensorFlow.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Sep 25th, 2020
item.description:
Web Scraping

  • Patternstars7.9k: High level scraping for well-establish websites such as Google, Twitter, and Wikipedia. Also has NLP, machine learning algorithms, and visualization

    • Deployment

  • binder - Enable sharing and execute Jupyter Notebooks
  • fastapi - Modern, fast (high-performance), web framework for building APIs with Python

    • Reinforcement Learning

  • TF-Agentsstars1.9k - A library for Reinforcement Learning in TensorFlow.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Aug 9th, 2020
item.description:
Machine Learning

Time Series

  • dateutil - Powerful extensions to the standard datetime module
  • mayastars3.3k - makes it very easy to parse a string and for changing timezones

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Jul 31st, 2020
item.description:
Web Scraping

  • BeautifulSoup: The easiest library to scrape static websites for beginners
  • Scrapy: Fast and extensible scraping library. Can write rules and create customized scraper without touching the coure
  • Selenium: Use Selenium Python API to access all functionalities of Selenium WebDriver in an intuitive way like a real user.
  • twitterscraperstars1.7k: Efficient library to scrape twitter

    • Data Manipulation

    Data Containers

  • pandas_profilingstars7.3k - Create HTML profiling reports from pandas DataFrame objects

    • Data Manipulation

    Pipelines

  • CircleCi: Automates your software builds, tests, and deployments.

    • Visualization

    Interactive plots

  • Bokehstars15.1k - Interactive Web Plotting for Python.
  • Altair - Declarative statistical visualization library for Python. Can easily do many data transformation within the code to create graph
  • bqplotstars3.1k - Plotting library for IPython/Jupyter notebooks

    • Visualization

    Automatic Plotting

  • HoloViewsstars1.9k - Stop plotting your data - annotate your data and let it visualize itself.
  • AutoVizstars345: Visualize data automatically with 1 line of code (ideal for machine learning)
  • SweetVizstars1.6k: Visualize and compare datasets, target values and associations, with one line of code.

    • Visualization

    NLP

  • pyLDAvisstars1.4k: Visualize interactive topic model

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Jul 25th, 2020
item.description:
Deep Learning

PyTorch

  • pytorch_geometric_temporalstars676 - Temporal Extension Library for PyTorch Geometric.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Jul 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Visualization

Map

  • folium - Makes it easy to visualize data on an interactive open street map
  • geemapstars1.1k - Python package for interactive mapping with Google Earth Engine (GEE)

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Jul 21st, 2020
item.description:
Deployment

  • datapane - A collection of APIs to turn scripts and notebooks into interactive reports.
  • streamlit - Make it easy to deploy machine learning model

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Jun 17th, 2020
item.description:
Data Manipulation

Data Containers

  • vaexstars6.1k - Out-of-Core DataFrames for Python, ML, visualize and explore big tabular data at a billion rows per second.

    • Machine Learning

    General Purpouse Machine Learning

  • causalmlstars1.9k - Uplift modeling and causal inference with machine learning algorithms.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science May 18th, 2020
item.description:
Machine Learning

General Purpouse Machine Learning

  • Little Ball of Furstars521 - A library for sampling graph structured data.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Jan 25th, 2020
item.description:
Machine Learning

General Purpouse Machine Learning

  • Karate Clubstars1.2k - An unsupervised machine learning library for graph structured data.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Nov 20th, 2019
item.description:
Deep Learning

PyTorch

  • Catalyststars2.6k - High-level utils for PyTorch DL & RL research.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Nov 18th, 2019
item.description:
Experimentation

  • Neptune - A lightweight ML experiment tracking, results visualization and management tool.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Nov 10th, 2019
item.description:
Data Manipulation

Pipelines

  • dopandastars423 - Hints and tips for using pandas in an analysis environment.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Oct 29th, 2019
item.description:
Optimization

  • scikit-optstars2.2k - Heuristic Algorithms for optimization.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Oct 28th, 2019
item.description:
Data Manipulation

Data Containers

  • pandas-logstars172 - A package which allow to provide feedback about basic pandas operations and find both buisness logic and performance issues.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Oct 26th, 2019
item.description:
Visualization

Interactive plots

  • plotly - A Python library that makes interactive and publication-quality graphs.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Oct 6th, 2019
item.description:
Machine Learning

General Purpouse Machine Learning

  • hyperlearnstars1.2k - 50%+ Faster, 50%+ less RAM usage, GPU support re-written Sklearn, Statsmodels.

    • Natural Language Processing

  • spaCy - Industrial-Strength Natural Language Processing.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Oct 5th, 2019
item.description:
Data Manipulation

Data Containers

  • pandas_flavorstars203 - A package which allow to write your own flavor of Pandas easily.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Sep 24th, 2019
item.description:
Deep Learning

PyTorch

  • PyTorchNetstars1.3k - An abstraction to train neural networks.

    • Deep Learning

    TensorFlow

  • tensorpackstars6k - A Neural Net Training Interface on TensorFlow.

    • Probabilistic Methods

  • MXFusionstars95 - Modular Probabilistic Programming on MXNet.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Sep 23rd, 2019
item.description:
Reinforcement Learning

  • Dopaminestars9.4k - A research framework for fast prototyping of reinforcement learning algorithms.

    • Statistics

  • weightedcalcsstars85 - A pandas-based utility to calculate weighted means, medians, distributions, standard deviations, and more.

    • Distributed Computing

  • PaddlePaddlestars15.1k - PArallel Distributed Deep LEarning.

    • Evaluation

  • sklearn-evaluationstars305 - Model evaluation made easy: plots, tables and markdown reports.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Sep 15th, 2019
item.description:
Statistics

  • statsmodelsstars6.3k - Statistical modeling and econometrics in Python.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Sep 7th, 2019
item.description:
Reinforcement Learning

  • OpenAI Baselinesstars11.5k - High-quality implementations of reinforcement learning algorithms.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Sep 5th, 2019
item.description:
Quantum Computing

  • PennyLanestars851 - Quantum machine learning, automatic differentiation, and optimization of hybrid quantum-classical computations.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Sep 4th, 2019
item.description:
Reinforcement Learning

  • keras-rlstars5k - Deep Reinforcement Learning for Keras.
  • Coachstars2k - Easy experimentation with state of the art Reinforcement Learning algorithms.
  • garagestars1.2k - A toolkit for reproducible reinforcement learning research.
  • Stable Baselinesstars3.1k - A set of improved implementations of reinforcement learning algorithms based on OpenAI Baselines.
  • RLlib - Scalable Reinforcement Learning.
  • Horizonstars2.9k - A platform for Applied Reinforcement Learning.
  • TensorForcestars2.9k - A TensorFlow library for applied reinforcement learning.
  • TRFLstars3.1k - TensorFlow Reinforcement Learning.
  • ChainerRLstars948 - A deep reinforcement learning library built on top of Chainer.

    • Deep Learning

    TensorFlow

  • keras-contribstars1.5k - Keras community contributions.
  • Hyperasstars2.1k - Keras + Hyperopt: A very simple wrapper for convenient hyperparameter.
  • Elephasstars1.5k - Distributed Deep learning with Keras & Spark.
  • Herastars498 - Train/evaluate a Keras model, get metrics streamed to a dashboard in your browser.
  • Spektralstars1.7k - Deep learning on graphs.
  • qkerasstars277 - A quantization deep learning library.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Sep 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Distributed Computing

  • Horovodstars11.2k - Distributed training framework for TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, and Apache MXNet.
  • PySpark - Exposes the Spark programming model to Python.
  • Velesstars891 - Distributed machine learning platform.
  • Jubatusstars702 - Framework and Library for Distributed Online Machine Learning.
  • DMTKstars2.8k - Microsoft Distributed Machine Learning Toolkit.
  • dask-mlstars708 - Distributed and parallel machine learning.
  • Distributedstars1.2k - Distributed computation in Python.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Sep 2nd, 2019
item.description:
Visualization

General Purposes

  • chartifystars2.9k - Python library that makes it easy for data scientists to create charts.
  • phyststars108 - Improved histograms.

    • Visualization

    Interactive plots

  • animatplotstars363 - A python package for animating plots build on matplotlib.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Aug 31st, 2019
item.description:
Deep Learning

MXNet

  • MXNetstars19.4k - Lightweight, Portable, Flexible Distributed/Mobile Deep Learning with Dynamic, Mutation-aware Dataflow Dep Scheduler.
  • Gluonstars2.3k - A clear, concise, simple yet powerful and efficient API for deep learning (now included in MXNet).
  • MXboxstars31 - Simple, efficient and flexible vision toolbox for mxnet framework.
  • gluon-cvstars4.7k - Provides implementations of the state-of-the-art deep learning models in computer vision.
  • gluon-nlpstars2.3k - NLP made easy.
  • Xferstars215 - Transfer Learning library for Deep Neural Networks.
  • MXNetstars30 - HIP Port of MXNet.

    • Model Explanation

  • mxboardstars331 - Logging MXNet data for visualization in TensorBoard.
  • pyBreakDownstars40 - Python implementation of R package breakDown.
  • Contrastive Explanationstars37 - Contrastive Explanation (Foil Trees).
  • yellowbrickstars3.2k - Visual analysis and diagnostic tools to facilitate machine learning model selection.
  • scikit-plotstars2.1k - An intuitive library to add plotting functionality to scikit-learn objects.
  • shapstars12.6k - A unified approach to explain the output of any machine learning model.
  • Limestars8.7k - Explaining the predictions of any machine learning classifier.
  • FairMLstars304 - FairML is a python toolbox auditing the machine learning models for bias.
  • model-analysisstars1.1k - Model analysis tools for TensorFlow.
  • themis-mlstars71 - A library that implements fairness-aware machine learning algorithms.
  • treeinterpreterstars658 - Interpreting scikit-learn's decision tree and random forest predictions.

    • Machine Learning

    General Purpouse Machine Learning

  • cuMLstars2.1k - RAPIDS Machine Learning Library.
  • Sparkit-learnstars1.1k - PySpark + scikit-learn = Sparkit-learn.
  • scikit-learn - Machine learning in Python.
  • modALstars1.2k - Modular active learning framework for Python3.
  • MLxtendstars3.5k - Extension and helper modules for Python's data analysis and machine learning libraries.
  • Reproducible Experiment Platform (REP)stars634 - Machine Learning toolbox for Humans.
  • scikit-multilearnstars658 - Multi-label classification for python.
  • seqlearnstars598 - Sequence classification toolkit for Python.
  • pystructstars636 - Simple structured learning framework for Python.
  • sklearn-expertsysstars458 - Highly interpretable classifiers for scikit learn, producing easily understood decision rules instead of black box models.
  • RuleFitstars236 - Implementation of the rulefit.
  • metric-learnstars1.1k - Metric learning algorithms in Python.

    • Machine Learning

    Extreme Learning Machine

  • hpelmstars161 - High performance implementation of Extreme Learning Machines (fast randomized neural networks).
  • Python-ELMstars456 - Extreme Learning Machine implementation in Python.
  • Python Extreme Learning Machine (ELM)stars63 - A machine learning technique used for classification/regression tasks.

    • Machine Learning

    Kernel Methods

  • ThunderSVMstars1.3k - A fast SVM Library on GPUs and CPUs.
  • pyFMstars836 - Factorization machines in python.
  • fastFMstars920 - A library for Factorization Machines.
  • tffmstars766 - TensorFlow implementation of an arbitrary order Factorization Machine.
  • scikit-rvmstars182 - Relevance Vector Machine implementation using the scikit-learn API.

    • Machine Learning

    Gradient Boosting

  • XGBooststars21k - Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting.
  • LightGBMstars12.5k - A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting.
  • CatBooststars5.9k - An open-source gradient boosting on decision trees library.
  • ThunderGBMstars591 - Fast GBDTs and Random Forests on GPUs.

    • Data Manipulation

    Data Containers

  • cuDFstars3.9k - GPU DataFrame Library.
  • datatablestars1.2k - Data.table for Python.
  • pysparklingstars233 - A pure Python implementation of Apache Spark's RDD and DStream interfaces.
  • blazestars2.9k - NumPy and pandas interface to Big Data.
  • pandasqlstars980 - Allows you to query pandas DataFrames using SQL syntax.
  • pandas-gbqstars250 - pandas Google Big Query.
  • koalasstars2.8k - pandas API on Apache Spark.
  • modinstars6k - Speed up your pandas workflows by changing a single line of code.

    • Data Manipulation

    Pipelines

  • Dplythonstars731 - Dplyr for Python.
  • pandas-plystars176 - Functional data manipulation for pandas.
  • sklearn-pandasstars2.4k - pandas integration with sklearn.
  • pyjanitorstars664 - Clean APIs for data cleaning.

    • Probabilistic Methods

  • pomegranatestars2.7k - Probabilistic and graphical models for Python.
  • PyMC3 - Python package for Bayesian statistical modeling and Probabilistic Machine Learning.
  • gelatostars84 - Bayesian dessert for Lasagne.
  • pyrostars6.9k - A flexible, scalable deep probabilistic programming library built on PyTorch.
  • PtStatstars108 - Probabilistic Programming and Statistical Inference in PyTorch.
  • PyVarInfstars324 - Bayesian Deep Learning methods with Variational Inference for PyTorch.
  • GPyTorchstars2.4k - A highly efficient and modular implementation of Gaussian Processes in PyTorch.
  • ZhuSuan - Bayesian Deep Learning.
  • Edward - A library for probabilistic modeling, inference, and criticism.
  • InferPystars130 - Deep Probabilistic Modelling Made Easy.
  • GPflow - Gaussian processes in TensorFlow.
  • sklearn-bayesstars432 - Python package for Bayesian Machine Learning with scikit-learn API.
  • skggmstars177 - Estimation of general graphical models.
  • skprostars108 - Supervised domain-agnostic prediction framework for probabilistic modelling by The Alan Turing Institute.
  • Abolethstars125 - A bare-bones TensorFlow framework for Bayesian deep learning and Gaussian process approximation.
  • sklearn-crfsuitestars369 - A scikit-learn inspired API for CRFsuite.

    • Deep Learning

    TensorFlow

  • NeuPystars679 - NeuPy is a Python library for Artificial Neural Networks and Deep Learning (previously: ).
  • tensorflow-upstreamstars556 - TensorFlow ROCm port.
  • TensorFlowstars155.7k - Computation using data flow graphs for scalable machine learning by Google.
  • TensorLayerstars6.6k - Deep Learning and Reinforcement Learning Library for Researcher and Engineer.
  • TFLearnstars9.5k - Deep learning library featuring a higher-level API for TensorFlow.
  • Sonnetstars8.9k - TensorFlow-based neural network library.
  • Polyaxonstars2.8k - A platform that helps you build, manage and monitor deep learning models.
  • tfdeploystars346 - Deploy tensorflow graphs for fast evaluation and export to tensorflow-less environments running numpy.
  • TensorFlow Foldstars1.8k - Deep learning with dynamic computation graphs in TensorFlow.
  • tensorlmstars62 - Wrapper library for text generation / language models at char and word level with RNN.
  • TensorLightstars9 - A high-level framework for TensorFlow.
  • Mesh TensorFlowstars1k - Model Parallelism Made Easier.
  • Ludwigstars7.7k - A toolbox, that allows to train and test deep learning models without the need to write code.

    • Deep Learning

    PyTorch

  • PyTorchstars48.1k - Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration.
  • torchvisionstars9k - Datasets, Transforms and Models specific to Computer Vision.
  • torchtextstars2.8k - Data loaders and abstractions for text and NLP.
  • torchaudiostars1.3k - An audio library for PyTorch.
  • ignitestars3.5k - High-level library to help with training neural networks in PyTorch.
  • skorchstars3.9k - A scikit-learn compatible neural network library that wraps pytorch.
  • pytorch_geometricstars11k - Geometric Deep Learning Extension Library for PyTorch.

    • Optimization

  • BoTorchstars1.9k - Bayesian optimization in PyTorch.
  • hyperopt-sklearnstars1.2k - Hyper-parameter optimization for sklearn.
  • sklearn-deapstars636 - Use evolutionary algorithms instead of gridsearch in scikit-learn.
  • sigopt_sklearnstars69 - SigOpt wrappers for scikit-learn methods.
  • GPflowOptstars231 - Bayesian Optimization using GPflow.

    • Machine Learning

    Time Series

  • tslearnstars1.6k - Machine learning toolkit dedicated to time-series data.
  • tickstars336 - Module for statistical learning, with a particular emphasis on time-dependent modelling.

    • Machine Learning

    Automated Machine Learning

  • TPOTstars8k - Automated Machine Learning tool that optimizes machine learning pipelines using genetic programming.
  • auto-sklearnstars5.4k - An automated machine learning toolkit and a drop-in replacement for a scikit-learn estimator.

    • Machine Learning

    Ensemble Methods

  • ML-Ensemble - High performance ensemble learning.
  • Stackingstars175 - Simple and useful stacking library, written in Python.
  • stacked_generalizationstars106 - Library for machine learning stacking generalization.
  • vecstackstars595 - Python package for stacking (machine learning technique).

    • Machine Learning

    Imbalanced Datasets

  • imbalanced-learnstars5.2k - Module to perform under sampling and over sampling with various techniques.
  • imbalanced-algorithmsstars184 - Python-based implementations of algorithms for learning on imbalanced data.

    • Machine Learning

    Random Forests

  • rpforeststars197 - A forest of random projection trees.
  • sklearn-random-bits-foreststars7 - Wrapper of the Random Bits Forest program written by (Wang et al., 2016).
  • rgf_pythonstars343 - Python Wrapper of Regularized Greedy Forest.

    • Feature Engineering

    General

  • skl-groupsstars40 - A scikit-learn addon to operate on set/"group"-based features.
  • Feature Forgestars378 - A set of tools for creating and testing machine learning feature.
  • fewstars44 - A feature engineering wrapper for sklearn.
  • scikit-mdrstars113 - A sklearn-compatible Python implementation of Multifactor Dimensionality Reduction (MDR) for feature construction.
  • tsfreshstars5.6k - Automatic extraction of relevant features from time series.

    • Feature Engineering

    Feature Selection

  • boruta_pystars942 - Implementations of the Boruta all-relevant feature selection method.
  • BoostARootastars165 - A fast xgboost feature selection algorithm.
  • scikit-rebatestars317 - A scikit-learn-compatible Python implementation of ReBATE, a suite of Relief-based feature selection algorithms for Machine Learning.
  • scikit-featurestars1.1k - Feature selection repository in python.

    • Genetic Programming

  • gplearnstars929 - Genetic Programming in Python.
  • karoo_gpstars132 - A Genetic Programming platform for Python with GPU support.
  • sklearn-geneticstars150 - Genetic feature selection module for scikit-learn.

    • Natural Language Processing

  • skiftstars216 - Scikit-learn wrappers for Python fastText.
  • pyMorfologikstars16 - Python binding for Morfologikstars155.
  • PSI-Toolkit - A natural language processing toolkit.
  • flairstars10.3k - Very simple framework for state-of-the-art NLP.

    • Statistics

  • pandas_summarystars364 - Extension to pandas dataframes describe function.
  • Pandas Profilingstars7.3k - Create HTML profiling reports from pandas DataFrame objects.
  • Alphalensstars1.9k - Performance analysis of predictive (alpha) stock factors.

    • Experimentation

  • Axstars1.5k - Adaptive Experimentation Platform.
  • Sacredstars3.4k - A tool to help you configure, organize, log and reproduce experiments.

    • Computations

  • Daskstars8.3k - Parallel computing with task scheduling.

    • Spatial Analysis

  • GeoPandasstars2.6k - Python tools for geographic data.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Aug 30th, 2019
item.description:
Data Manipulation

Data Containers

  • swifterstars1.6k - A package which efficiently applies any function to a pandas dataframe or series in the fastest available manner.

    • Data Manipulation

    Pipelines

  • mezastars376 - A Python toolkit for processing tabular data.

    • Model Explanation

  • Auralisationstars37 - Auralisation of learned features in CNN (for audio).
  • CapsNet-Visualizationstars373 - A visualization of the CapsNet layers to better understand how it works.
  • lucidstars4.2k - A collection of infrastructure and tools for research in neural network interpretability.
  • Netronstars14.4k - Visualizer for deep learning and machine learning models (no Python code, but visualizes models from most Python Deep Learning frameworks).
  • FlashLight - Visualization Tool for your NeuralNetwork.
  • tensorboard-pytorchstars6.9k - Tensorboard for pytorch (and chainer, mxnet, numpy, ...).

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Aug 29th, 2019
item.description:
Deep Learning

PyTorch

  • PyTounestars470 - A Keras-like framework and utilities for PyTorch.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Aug 27th, 2019
item.description:
Experimentation

  • Persimmonstars180 - A visual dataflow programming language for sklearn.
  • Xcessivstars1.3k - A web-based application for quick, scalable, and automated hyperparameter tuning and stacked ensembling.

    • Data Manipulation

    Data Containers

  • pandas - Powerful Python data analysis toolkit.
  • xpandasstars25 - Universal 1d/2d data containers with Transformers .functionality for data analysis by The Alan Turing Institute.
  • Arcticstars2.3k - High performance datastore for time series and tick data.

    • Data Manipulation

    Pipelines

  • SSPipe - Python pipe (|) operator with support for DataFrames and Numpy and Pytorch.
  • Datasetstars158 - Helps you conveniently work with random or sequential batches of your data and define data processing.
  • Prodmodelstars46 - Build system for data science pipelines.
  • pdpipestars606 - Sasy pipelines for pandas DataFrames.

    • Feature Engineering

    General

  • Featuretoolsstars5.5k - Automated feature engineering.

    • Visualization

    General Purposes

  • Matplotlibstars13.6k - Plotting with Python.
  • seabornstars8.4k - Statistical data visualization using matplotlib.
  • prettyplotlibstars1.6k - Painlessly create beautiful matplotlib plots.
  • python-ternarystars413 - Ternary plotting library for python with matplotlib.
  • missingnostars2.8k - Missing data visualization module for Python.

    • Model Explanation

  • Alibistars982 - Algorithms for monitoring and explaining machine learning models.
  • anchorstars635 - Code for "High-Precision Model-Agnostic Explanations" paper.
  • aequitasstars378 - Bias and Fairness Audit Toolkit.
  • ELI5stars2.4k - A library for debugging/inspecting machine learning classifiers and explaining their predictions.
  • L2Xstars89 - Code for replicating the experiments in the paper Learning to Explain: An Information-Theoretic Perspective on Model Interpretation.
  • PDPboxstars569 - Partial dependence plot toolbox.
  • PyCEboxstars101 - Python Individual Conditional Expectation Plot Toolbox.
  • Skaterstars974 - Python Library for Model Interpretation.
  • AI Explainability 360stars828 - Interpretability and explainability of data and machine learning models.

    • Probabilistic Methods

  • PyMCstars894 - Bayesian Stochastic Modelling in Python.
  • sampledstars45 - Decorator for reusable models in PyMC3.
  • PyStanstars71 - Bayesian inference using the No-U-Turn sampler (Python interface).
  • emceestars1.1k - The Python ensemble sampling toolkit for affine-invariant MCMC.
  • hsmmlearnstars50 - A library for hidden semi-Markov models with explicit durations.
  • pyhsmmstars486 - Bayesian inference in HSMMs and HMMs.
  • pgmpystars1.8k - A python library for working with Probabilistic Graphical Models.

    • Genetic Programming

  • DEAPstars4.2k - Distributed Evolutionary Algorithms in Python.
  • monkeysstars99 - A strongly-typed genetic programming framework for Python.

    • Optimization

  • Spearmintstars1.4k - Bayesian optimization.
  • SMAC3stars577 - Sequential Model-based Algorithm Configuration.
  • hyperoptstars5.6k - Distributed Asynchronous Hyperparameter Optimization in Python.
  • SafeOptstars93 - Safe Bayesian Optimization.
  • scikit-optimizestars2.1k - Sequential model-based optimization with a scipy.optimize interface.
  • Solidstars547 - A comprehensive gradient-free optimization framework written in Python.
  • PySwarmsstars774 - A research toolkit for particle swarm optimization in Python.
  • Platypusstars332 - A Free and Open Source Python Library for Multiobjective Optimization.
  • POTstars1k - Python Optimal Transport library.
  • Talosstars1.4k - Hyperparameter Optimization for Keras Models.
  • nloptstars1k - Library for nonlinear optimization (global and local, constrained or unconstrained).
  • Optunitystars369 - Is a library containing various optimizers for hyperparameter tuning.

    • Natural Language Processing

  • NLTKstars9.9k - Modules, data sets, and tutorials supporting research and development in Natural Language Processing.
  • CLTKstars658 - The Classical Language Toolkik.
  • gensim - Topic Modelling for Humans.
  • Phonemizerstars434 - Simple text to phonemes converter for multiple languages.

    • Computer Audition

  • librosastars4.5k - Python library for audio and music analysis.
  • Yaafestars191 - Audio features extraction.
  • aubiostars2.1k - A library for audio and music analysis.
  • Essentiastars1.8k - Library for audio and music analysis, description and synthesis.
  • LibXtractstars201 - A simple, portable, lightweight library of audio feature extraction functions.
  • Marsyasstars336 - Music Analysis, Retrieval and Synthesis for Audio Signals.
  • mudastars182 - A library for augmenting annotated audio data.
  • madmomstars739 - Python audio and music signal processing library.

    • Computer Vision

  • OpenCVstars54.3k - Open Source Computer Vision Library.
  • scikit-imagestars4.3k - Image Processing SciKit (Toolbox for SciPy).
  • imgaugstars11.1k - Image augmentation for machine learning experiments.
  • imgaug_extension - Additional augmentations for imgaug.
  • Augmentorstars4.4k - Image augmentation library in Python for machine learning.
  • albumentationsstars7.9k - Fast image augmentation library and easy to use wrapper around other libraries.

    • Statistics

  • scikit-posthocsstars198 - Pairwise Multiple Comparisons Post-hoc Tests.

    • Evaluation

  • recmetricsstars263 - Library of useful metrics and plots for evaluating recommender systems.
  • Metricsstars1.4k - Machine learning evaluation metric.
  • AI Fairness 360stars1.4k - Fairness metrics for datasets and ML models, explanations and algorithms to mitigate bias in datasets and models.

    • Computations

  • bottleneckstars606 - Fast NumPy array functions written in C.
  • CuPystars5.1k - NumPy-like API accelerated with CUDA.
  • scikit-tensorstars382 - Python library for multilinear algebra and tensor factorizations.
  • numdifftoolsstars145 - Solve automatic numerical differentiation problems in one or more variables.
  • quaternionstars405 - Add built-in support for quaternions to numpy.
  • adaptivestars657 - Tools for adaptive and parallel samping of mathematical functions.
  • numpy - The fundamental package needed for scientific computing with Python.

    • Spatial Analysis

  • PySalstars845 - Python Spatial Analysis Library.

    • Quantum Computing

  • QMLstars144 - A Python Toolkit for Quantum Machine Learning.

    • Conversion

  • sklearn-porterstars1k - Transpile trained scikit-learn estimators to C, Java, JavaScript and others.
  • ONNXstars10.3k - Open Neural Network Exchange.
  • MMdnnstars5.3k - A set of tools to help users inter-operate among different deep learning frameworks.

    • Machine Learning

    General Purpouse Machine Learning

  • Shogun - Machine learning toolbox.
  • xLearnstars2.9k - High Performance, Easy-to-use, and Scalable Machine Learning Package.
  • mlpackstars3.7k - A scalable C++ machine learning library (Python bindings).
  • dlibstars10.1k - Toolkit for making real world machine learning and data analysis applications in C++ (Python bindings).
  • pyGAMstars590 - Generalized Additive Models in Python.

    • Machine Learning

    Time Series

  • Prophetstars12.7k - Automatic Forecasting Procedure.
  • PyFluxstars1.9k - Open source time series library for Python.
  • bayesloopstars90 - Probabilistic programming framework that facilitates objective model selection for time-varying parameter models.
  • luminolstars916 - Anomaly Detection and Correlation library.

    • Machine Learning

    Kernel Methods

  • liquidSVMstars51 - An implementation of SVMs.

    • Reinforcement Learning

  • OpenAI Gymstars24.1k - A toolkit for developing and comparing reinforcement learning algorithms.

    • Machine Learning

    Automated Machine Learning

  • MLBoxstars1.2k - A powerful Automated Machine Learning python library.

item.title: krzjoa/awesome-python-data-science Dec 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Optimization

  • Bayesian Optimizationstars5.1k - A Python implementation of global optimization with gaussian processes.

    • Statistics

  • stockstatsstars774 - Supply a wrapper StockDataFrame based on the pandas.DataFrame with inline stock statistics/indicators support.
